name: Quelites- Spinach & Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the bacon in a skillet until crispy, then remove and finely chop it.
2. Wash the spinach well and steam for about 10 minutes until tender.
3. Remove the steamed spinach and finely chop it. In the same skillet, sauté the chopped onions in the bacon fat.
4. Add the chopped spinach, salt, crushed red chile, and cooked pinto beans to the skillet. Stir gently.
5. Continue cooking for an additional 5 minutes until everything is well combined and heated through. Serve hot with tortillas.
